actionCalls.description: Revenue Qualification Decision Table when a member detected
actionCalls.name: Revenue_Qualification_DT_With_Member
actionCalls.label: Revenue Qualification DT - With Member

actionCalls.description: Revenue Qualification Decision Table when no member detected
actionCalls.name: RevenueQualification_DT_Non_Member
actionCalls.label: Revenue Qualification DT - Non Member

assignments.name: Assign_stay_qualification_DT_single_result
assignments.label: Assign stay qualification DT single result

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_construct_Disqualified_Matched_Rules_List
assignments.label: Copy 1 of construct Disqualified Matched Rules List Reward Night

assignments.name: Get_DT_Result_From_Member_Rule_DT
assignments.label: Get DT Result From Member Rule DT

assignments.name: Get_DT_Result_From_Non_Member_Rule_DT
assignments.label: Get DT Result From Non Member Rule DT

decisions.name: check_if_room_is_included_in_output
decisions.label: check if room is included in output

decisions.name: Check_if_Stay_Match_Reward_Night_Rule
decisions.label: Check if Stay Match Reward Night Rule

formulas.name: fRemoveRoomOverrideRevenue
formulas.expression: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!OverrideRevBucket_String},'Cumulative Room Revenue;',null), 'Cumulative Room Revenue', null )

formulas.name: fRemoveRoomRevenue
formulas.expression: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!RevBucket_String},'Cumulative Room Revenue;',null), 'Cumulative Room Revenue', null )

formulas.name: TotalQR_USD_AfterRR
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue02"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue03"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenueUSD__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue04"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenueUSD__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue05"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenueUSD__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue06"), {!StayRecord.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevUSD__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), {!StayRecord.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevUSD__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue08"), {!StayRecord.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenueUSD__c} , 0)

formulas.name: TotalQRAfterRR
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue02"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue03"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenue__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue04"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenue__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue05"), {!StayRecord.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenue__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue06"), {!StayRecord.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevenue__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), {!StayRecord.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevenue__c} , 0) + IF(INCLUDES( {!DTMatchOutput.LOY_RevenueQualificationBucket__c} , "IHG_RQRevenue08"), {!StayRecord.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenue__c} , 0)

recordLookups.name: Get_revenue_rules_record_type_Id
recordLookups.label: Get revenue rules record type Id

recordLookups.name: Get_Stay_rules_record_type_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Stay rules record type Id

recordUpdates.name: Update_Stay_Diqualified_Room_Rev_included
recordUpdates.label: Update Stay Diqualified Room Rev included
